## Meeting purpose

[Discuss progress on AI-generated content for D-Graph and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Promising initial results from AI-generated technical content, though still needs refinement](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Plan to incorporate human review and editing, especially for technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Exploring ways to optimize the content generation process using various AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Need to establish content style guidelines aligned with D-Graph's voice](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

## Topics

### Competitive Research

  - [Conducted research on competitors, related sites ranking for relevant topics](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Identified opportunities to target keywords where D-Graph can provide unique value](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Process helped the researcher understand D-Graph's ecosystem better](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)

### Content Calibration

  - [Generated sample content for "Python Graph Visualization" using AI with no human editing](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Shows potential with accurate links, code snippets but needs voice/tone adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Outlined multi-step process leveraging web scraping, APIs like Perplexity, GPT prompting](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [Raised need for technical review to check accuracy, length, value compared to existing content](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Hank to provide feedback on sample content quality, areas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Find examples of desired content style/voice for D-Graph](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Determine level of technical team involvement in the review process](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [Discuss publishing workflow for finalized AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/6oE_d6dBN3LzzZsSEAjzzaJ6tDZK5dkh?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
